A1000E_NTV_HI_PCFC_ISLNDR_CD A1000E Race/Ethnicity: Native Hawaiian/Pacific Islander Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident's ethnicity is Native Hawaiian/Pacific Islander. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes) discontinued 09/30/2023
59 A1000F_WHT_CD A1000F_WHT_CD A1000F Race/Ethnicity: White Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident's ethnicity is white. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
